title: Hub v2 Dependency
description: Cross-entry dependency reference used by both HubModel.dependencies[] and HubAssistant.dependencies[]. Purely informational in v2 — no auto-installer; the FE surfaces dependencies as 'Works best with' chips.

kind.description: Category of the referenced entry. Mirrors the catalog category enum.

name.description: Reverse-DNS name of the referenced entry. MUST equal an existing entry's envelope.name.

versionRange.description: npm-style semver range, or '*' for any version. Evaluated by the FE against the referenced entry's envelope.version.
